name: Pumpkin Raisin Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Karo light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9-inch square baking pan with cooking spray.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, nonfat dry milk, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and pumpkin pie spice. Stir in the raisins.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together the egg whites, canned pumpkin, corn syrup, and orange juice until smooth.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan on a wire rack. If desired, serve with Fat Free Yogurt Cream Sauce.
8. Makes 16 servings.
